LAW AND MOTION 301, (AMENDED) NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL; APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TOM GRAY WAS PRESENT ON HIS OWN BEHALF NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. calendar.matters:
(Amended) Notice Of Motion For Order For Entry Of Judgment Of Dismissal; (Amended) P & A; (Amended) Decl; Pos
Off Calendar May-09-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: plaintiff Tom Gray (415) 820-3200 was present on his own behalf.

Because plaintiff did not give notice of his appearance today and did not file written opposition, defendant San Francisco Community College District's Motion for Order for Entry of Judgment of Dismissal was granted. No opposition filed. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: SUSTAINED - no opposition filed. Ten days to amend. (JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Tentative ruling adopted as the order of the court: GRANTED - no opposition filed. (JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
